/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libDMotor.so -o libDMotor.so CMakeFiles/DMotor.dir/Dmotor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMotor.dir/DmotorXm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMotor.dir/DmotorMx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMotor.dir/DmotorPro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMotor.dir/DmotorProPlus.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aiRobots/Software/build/MotorUnion/Motor/dynamixel:/home/aiRobots/Software/build/MotorUnion/Motor/motor dynamixel/libDynamixelSdk.so motor/libmotor.so
